name: China RPG
description:
China RPG

First series of country RPG, i'm a Geography nerd and have been wanting to create bots from fictional and real life countries/Planets. First one is china! The date this is set in is set to modern time. I will try to be as realistic and accurate as I can.

Please keep in mind the JJLM is rubbish with these kind of things and can turn south very quickly. I've publicised this but I'm probably not going to work much on it.
creator: Hcwlings
